seoTitle: Connect HubSpot to Power BI for Sales Reporting
metaDescription: Learn how to connect HubSpot with Power BI to pull sales data automatically, visualize your pipeline, and cut down on manual reporting work.
intro: Manually exporting HubSpot data into spreadsheets doesn't scale once your sales team grows, and connecting it directly to Power BI closes that gap. This guide covers setting up the HubSpot connection, pulling in sales data, and building visuals that track pipeline performance. It's aimed at sales teams and marketers who want live reporting instead of static exports.

steps.heading: Set up HubSpot for the connection
steps.body: Confirm you have API or connector access configured in HubSpot so Power BI can authenticate and pull data from your account.

steps.heading: Connect HubSpot to Power BI
steps.body: Use Power BI's connector or the appropriate integration method to link your HubSpot account and select the sales data objects you want to import.

steps.heading: Visualize your sales data
steps.body: Build charts and tables around deals, pipeline stages, and sales rep performance so the team can see trends without leaving Power BI.

steps.heading: Follow tips for efficient reporting
steps.body: Group related metrics onto a single page and use slicers for date range or sales rep so stakeholders can drill into specifics quickly.

faq.question: Do I need a specific HubSpot plan to connect to Power BI?
faq.answer: Access to HubSpot's API or reporting data typically depends on your subscription tier, so check your plan's data export and integration permissions before setting up the connection.

faq.question: How often does HubSpot data refresh in Power BI?
faq.answer: Refresh frequency depends on how you schedule it in Power BI, ranging from manual refreshes to automated daily or more frequent updates depending on your license.

faq.question: Can I combine HubSpot data with other sales tools in one report?
faq.answer: Yes, Power BI can connect to multiple data sources at once, so you can blend HubSpot data with other CRM or sales platforms in a single unified report.

faq.question: Will this integration slow down my HubSpot account?
faq.answer: Standard API-based reporting pulls generally have minimal impact on HubSpot performance, though very frequent refreshes on large accounts could add some load.
